title: Powerhouse Color Token Definitions
content: Powerhouse parent brand color tokens from powerhouse/colors.css (https://github.com/powerhouse-inc/design-systems/blob/main/powerhouse/colors.css). Light theme (:root): --primary: #32373B, --primary-foreground: #FFFFFF, --accent-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #00D4FF, #7A3AFF), --accent-cyan: #00D4FF, --accent-purple: #7A3AFF, --secondary: #F4F4F4, --secondary-foreground: #343839, --accent: #F3F5F7, --accent-foreground: #000000, --background: #FCFCFC, --foreground: #343839, --card: #FCFCFC, --card-foreground: #343839, --popover: #FFFFFF, --muted: #EFEFEF, --muted-foreground: #9EA0A1, --border: #D7D8D9, --input: #FFFFFF, --ring: #343839. Dark theme (.dark / [data-theme="dark"]): --primary: #F3F5F7 (inverted), --primary-foreground: #0E0E0D, --secondary: #4F596F, --secondary-foreground: #A6B1C7, --accent: #2A2D33, --accent-foreground: #F3F5F7, --background: #0E0E0D, --foreground: #FCFCFC, --card: #1A1D22, --card-foreground: #F3F5F7, --popover: #151719, --muted: #2A2D33, --muted-foreground: #6C7275, --border: #3A3F47, --input: #0E0E0D, --ring: #F3F5F7.
description: Complete Powerhouse parent brand token set: primary #32373B (light) inverts to #F3F5F7 (dark), plus unique gradient tokens.
